assets.prompt: Hand-authored SVG mark: rounded navy (#0f1b33) square with an ascending blue (#2f6fed) line and a white endpoint dot, evoking a rising fitness (CTL) curve. No third-party assets used.
assets.notes: Superseded as the nav mark by public/logo.png. Kept as a vector fallback.

assets.prompt: TrainingGeeks brushed wordmark mark, background removed (rembg u2net).
Favicon: logo.png composited centered on a navy (#0f1b33) rounded tile at 512x512 (PIL).
assets.notes: Next.js app icon. Replaced the earlier src/app/icon.svg.

assets.prompt: Apple touch icon: logo.png on a navy rounded tile at 180x180 (PIL).
macOS app-icon master: logo.png on a navy rounded tile at 1024x1024 (PIL).
assets.notes: Source for the Tauri macOS .icns size set.

assets.prompt: Two single scullers racing on a lake. Original 6240x4160; resized to 1920x1280, q82 progressive JPEG (PIL).
assets.notes: Login page hero background. public/login-hero-sm.jpg is the 960-wide variant.
Default profile avatar (top nav + settings profile).

assets.prompt: Gold race medal with ribbon and '1', background removed (rembg u2net).
assets.notes: 1st-place marker in Peak Performances podium. Also medal-silver.png (2), medal-bronze.png (3).
Equipment thumbnail for bikes. sport-run.png (running shoe) used for shoes.
